turns.user_message: I feel a constant ache in my chest whenever I think about them. It's just this dull, heavy weight that sits there.
That ache has turned into a sharp pang every time I remember something good. It's getting harder to push the feeling away.
The pain is so sharp now I can barely breathe when it hits. I'm starting to wonder if I should talk to someone about this.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by describing a physical feeling.
